_comment: M5 multi-location registry — the single source of truth for every tracked town except Boone (Boone stays at the legacy top-level data/ paths and on the homepage). Coordinate provenance is mandatory (standing rule: no eyeballed pins). Towns without rays_station_id have NO Ray's station in their community — Ray renders honestly absent there; never borrow a neighboring station. Spec: planning/specs/2026-07-18-multi-location-multiplication-design.md

locations.name: Blowing Rock
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-18 (Watauga entry, pop 1292, elev 1089 m); elevation cross-checked against the town's published ~3,566 ft
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-18: 'Blowing Rock' (downtown, 36.132156/-81.679039, ~350 m from our pin)

locations.name: Deep Gap
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-18 (Watauga County entry, elev 915 m; the Graham County Deep Gap explicitly rejected)
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-18: 'Deep Gap' (36.236301/-81.52066, ~750 m from our pin)

locations.name: Banner Elk
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 (Avery entry, pop 1138, elev 1128 m)
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-19: 'Banner Elk' (Town Hall, 0.3 km from our pin)

locations.name: Beech Mountain
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 — the Avery entry (elev 1657 m) is the mountaintop town center; the lower Watauga-side CDP fragment (1294 m) deliberately rejected. Highest incorporated town in the eastern US (~5,506 ft published).
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-19: 'Beech Mountain' (Fred's General Mercantile atop the mountain, 5,028 ft, ~0.7 km from our pin)

locations.name: Seven Devils
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 (Avery entry, pop 192, elev 1210 m); town straddles the county line. NO rays_station_id: Ray has no Seven Devils station (nearest are Banner Elk 2.9 km, Sugar Mountain 3.8 km — different communities).

locations.name: Valle Crucis
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 (Watauga entry, pop 412, elev 816 m)
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-19: 'Valle Crucis' (0.2 km from our pin)

locations.name: Vilas
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-19: 'Vilas' (Motorcycle Medic in Vilas, 3.7 km from our pin — dispersed rural community, station explicitly sited in Vilas)

locations.name: Foscoe
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 (Watauga entry, pop 1370, elev 927 m); Hwy 105 corridor
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-19: 'Foscoe' (Holloway Corner Kitchen on Hwy 105, 0.6 km from our pin)

locations.name: West Jefferson
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 (Ashe entry, pop 1308, elev 907 m)
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-19: 'West Jefferson' (0.4 km from our pin, AsheWeather.Com)

locations.name: Sugar Grove
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 (Watauga entry, elev 816 m). NO rays_station_id: Ray has no Sugar Grove station (nearest is Vilas 3.5 km — a different community).

locations.name: Todd
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 (Ashe entry, elev 909 m); community straddles the county line
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-19: 'Todd' (3.7 km from our pin — dispersed river-valley community, station explicitly named Todd, AsheWeather.Com)

locations.name: Jefferson
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 (Ashe county seat, pop 1606, elev 890 m)
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-19: 'Jefferson' (name match, 3.1 km; the closer West Jefferson station belongs to the neighboring town and is mapped there)

locations.name: Spruce Pine
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 (Mitchell town entry, pop 2134, elev 780 m; matches the town's published ~2,517 ft)
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-19: 'Spruce Pine' (2.5 km from our pin, MitchellWeather.Com)

locations.name: Bakersville
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 (Mitchell county seat, pop 452, elev 753 m)
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-19: 'Bakersville' (0.6 km from our pin, MitchellWeather.Com)

locations.name: North Wilkesboro
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 (Wilkes entry, pop 4226, elev 305 m — the coverage set's foothills anchor)
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-19: 'North Wilkesboro' (2.3 km from our pin, WilkesWeather.Com)

locations.name: Wilkesboro
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 (Wilkes county seat, pop 3531, elev 312 m). NO rays_station_id: Ray's only station in the twin towns is North Wilkesboro — a different municipality across the Yadkin; the no-borrowing rule stands.

locations.name: Burnsville
locations.provenance: Open-Meteo geocoder 2026-07-19 (Yancey county seat, pop 1660, elev 861 m)
locations.rays_station_provenance: weather.station.list 2026-07-19: 'Burnsville (Hawk Branch)' — 8.3 km from town center but it is Ray's own named Burnsville station (BurnsvilleWeather.Com), i.e. HIS Burnsville product, not a borrowed neighbor
